# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you believe you've found a security vulnerability in Cinnasole, please do **not** open a public issue.

Instead, contact me privately on Discord (kiirod) with these:

- A description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce it
- Any relevant logs or screenshots
- A suggested fix (if you have one)

Please allow time for the issue to be investigated before disclosing it publicly.

Thank you for helping keep Cinnasole secure.
